name: ai-agent-manager-plugin
description: AI agents v13.0.0 — New orchestration semantics layer above Launch Pad and Supervisor: a new /autonomous slash command that chains /launch-pad → /supervisor for a single requirement and, in opt-in multi-iteration mode (--allow-multi-iteration), re-plans the next iteration on two specific SUPERVISOR_RESULT signals (rubric_score N<M with user-merge confirmation; failed + inter_subtask_gap on this iteration's brief). Foreground-assisted automation — Launch Pad Phase 6, NO-GO, Plan Review FAIL × 3, Supervisor adjudication 4-option, and the loop's own rubric gate all bubble AskUserQuestion in-session. v13 is purely additive: no new agent, no new hook, no schema change, no source change to any existing agent / command / skill / hook / doc / script. Iteration-scoping via anchor-by-filename (.supervisor/jobs/failed/{basename(current_brief_path)} existence) ensures no false-positive from prior runs. Preserves all v12.2.0 capabilities (Agent Teams graduation, Outcomes Rubric, /dreaming, opt-in webhook hook), v12.1.0 documentation increments (Memory Tool, Structured Outputs, SDK-only Advisor note), v12.0.0 reliability primitives (provides/requires contracts, pre-spawn verification, 4-option adjudication, effort-tier discipline, WORKER_RESULT schema_version 2), and prior v11/v10 layers. 13 agent roles, 50 reusable skills, 14 quality gate hooks, 12 slash commands, persistent agent memory, bundled MySQL MCP server.
